name: Top of the Stove
recipeIngredient: 1 can Campbell's Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles in boiling water for 20 minutes or until tender. Drain and keep warm.
2. While the noodles are cooking, brown the ground beef and onions. Drain off excess fat.
3. Combine the ground beef mixture, soups, sour cream, and Italian seasoning in a large saucepan.
4. Simmer for 10 minutes, stirring frequently (do not boil).
5. Serve over warm noodles. Serves 8.
